function.name: checkAvailability
function.description: Check available appointment slots at Beverly Hills Rejuvenation Center Henderson. Call this once you know the treatment requested and the caller's day/time preference.

treatment.description: Treatment the caller wants, e.g. 'HydraFacial', 'Botox consultation', 'Morpheus8'

date_preference.description: Caller's preferred days and/or times, e.g. 'weekend afternoon' or 'Tuesday or Thursday morning'
